positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_conjecture.tptp
1. ! [X0,X1] : (read(X0,X1) => gains_knowledge(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (gains_knowledge(X0) => becomes_smarter(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. read(harry,walden) [input(axiom)]
4. becomes_smarter(harry) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~becomes_smarter(harry) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ~becomes_smarter(harry) [flattening 5]
7. ! [X0,X1] : (gains_knowledge(X0) | ~read(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 1]
8. ! [X0] : (becomes_smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
9. ~read(X0,X1) | gains_knowledge(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
10. ~gains_knowledge(X0) | becomes_smarter(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
11. read(harry,walden) [cnf transformation 3]
12. ~becomes_smarter(harry) [cnf transformation 6]
13. gains_knowledge(harry) [resolution 9,11]
14. becomes_smarter(harry) [resolution 13,10]
15. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,12]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_conjecture.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define read(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define gains_knowledge(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define becomes_smarter(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
